limitations: Per-unit audit signals are aggregate review aids, not legal findings.
OCR heuristics are approximate and require human review before interpretation.
Duplicate text hashes may reflect boilerplate or repeated legal text and are not proof of OCR duplication.
The scope is the published map-unit layer, not every LOCUS jurisdiction.

quality_signal_definitions.audit_attention_score: 0-100 review-priority signal from OCR-review rate and duplicate-text-hash rate; not a ranking or legal finding.
quality_signal_definitions.duplicate_text_hash_rows: Rows whose text hash is shared by another row inside the published map-unit scope.
quality_signal_definitions.ocr_review_rows: Rows with medium or high OCR-risk heuristics.

source_artifacts.audit_basis: local Polars aggregate scan over published map units
